meta.title: Plodnee — Personal Debt Advisor
meta.description: Analyze debt structure, calculate debt-free plans, and get tailored advice.

auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Sign in with Keycloak SSO to start using Plodnee

bullets.mfa: MFA and Passkey supported via Keycloak
bullets.account: Use your corporate or personal account

legal.prefix: By signing in you agree to

brand.desc: Analyze debt structure, calculate debt-free plans, and get tailored advice — no judgment, no upselling.

composer.placeholder: Type your question... (Shift+Enter for new line)
composer.disclaimer: Plodnee may give inaccurate responses — verify important information before deciding

empty.lead: I'm your personal debt advisor — ask me anything, from planning your repayment to calculating interest or negotiating with your bank. Everything stays private.

suggestions.title: Help me consolidate all my credit card debt
suggestions.desc: Analyze interest rates and recommend the best consolidation approach

suggestions.title: Calculate my DSR
suggestions.desc: See what percentage of your income goes to debt repayment

suggestions.title: Build a debt-free plan in 24 months
suggestions.desc: Create a monthly repayment plan based on your income

suggestions.title: Draft a letter to request lower interest
suggestions.desc: Help write a letter to negotiate with your bank appropriately

faqs.a: Debt restructuring means renegotiating repayment terms with creditors — for example, reducing interest rates, extending the repayment period, or lowering monthly installments.

faqs.q: What documents should I prepare before starting?
faqs.a: Prepare (1) latest statements, (2) copies of loan agreements, (3) 3 months of pay slips, (4) monthly expense records.
Initial consultations and debt analysis through the system are free. Fees only apply if you choose the full negotiation-on-your-behalf service.
All data is encrypted with AES-256 and stored under PDPA standards. Sign-in uses Keycloak SSO with MFA.
